headline: Tammy Kiely
summary: When she left more than two decades later, she was a partner running semiconductor investment banking globally and co-leading tech investment banking.  A Bay Area native, Kiely joined  Evercore  in 2023 as a senior managing director and partner.  At  Evercore  Kiely has advised clients such as  Synopsys  in its $35 billion acquisition of Ansys, and Ampere in its $6.5 billion sale to SoftBank.

headline: Nvidia Partner Synopsys Accelerates Shift From Silicon To Systems
summary: Synopsys this week detailed how its acquisition of Ansys will help the EDA company accelerate its shift from chips to complete electronic systems.

headline: Chip designer Synopsys will invest in 3 ways, CEO explains
summary: Synopsys (SNPS) has unveiled new tools for artificial intelligence (AI) chips. Synopsys president and CEO Sassine Ghazi joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to explain the company's three key areas of investment, why high-speed memory supply likely won't catch up until 2027, and more. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.
